# HelloGrowthCRM — robots.txt
# Canonical domain: https://hellogrowthcrm.com
# This file mirrors the policy generated by src/app/robots.ts in the Next.js app.
# Last synced: 2026-05-15

# ---- Default: all crawlers ----
User-agent: *
Allow: /
Disallow: /api/
Disallow: /dashboard/
Disallow: /admin/
Disallow: /admin
Disallow: /reset-password
Disallow: /cdn-cgi/
Disallow: /search
Disallow: /search?*

# ---- Major search engines — full access ----
User-agent: Googlebot
Allow: /

User-agent: Googlebot-Image
Allow: /

User-agent: Googlebot-News
Allow: /

User-agent: Googlebot-Video
Allow: /

Allow: /

Allow: /

Allow: /

Allow: /

User-agent: YandexBot
Allow: /

User-agent: Sogou
Allow: /

User-agent: Exabot
Allow: /

User-agent: ia_archiver
Allow: /
